svg.title: Shapash backend architecture and data flow
svg.desc: Shows how SmartExplainer, BaseBackend, ShapBackend/LimeBackend/CustomBackend, and State interact to produce contributions and visualisations.

g.text: resolves backend string → instantiates backend class, calls backend.run_explainer(x)
aggregates contributions, ranks, filters, plots, reports
run_explainer(x) → dict ← only method you MUST implement
